home.title: 🧠 Cognitive Ability Test
home.subtitle:
Welcome to this cognitive assessment
Designed by Cognitive Expert Wu Feng-Yue
This test will comprehensively evaluate your:

ability_cards.rea_desc: Yes/No test, evaluates reaction and inhibition
ability_cards.att_desc: Average of three abilities, evaluates focus stability

info_table.heading: 🧠 Cognitive Test / Scored by Completion Speed

home.guest_warning:
⚠️ Guest mode cannot save scores or track cognitive changes.
It is recommended to log in to keep a complete record of your cognitive trends.

login.title: 🔐 User Login
login.info: Log in to view your test history and progress trends

register.title: 📝 Register Account
register.info: Register an account to save test records and track your progress

profile.title: 📝 Basic Information
profile.warning: ⚠️ Please provide real information to ensure accurate age norm comparison

instructions.title: 📖 Test Instructions
instructions.practice_hint: 💡 Tip: Practice questions can be repeated until you are familiar and won't affect your final score

mem.title: 🧠 Memory Test Instructions
steps: The screen will sequentially show {min} to {max} shapes
Each shape is displayed for 2 seconds. Remember the sequence
After watching, click in order the shapes you just saw
If you make a mistake, click again to deselect
Time limit is 10s (increasing) per question, 5 questions in total
mem.tip: Shapes come in different colors and forms. Please distinguish them carefully.

rea.title: ⚡ Reaction Test Instructions
steps: Then a test shape will appear. Judge if its shape AND color are exactly the same as the target
If exactly the same, click 'Same'; otherwise, click 'Different'
Time limit is 5s per question, 10 questions in total
rea.tip: Both shape and color must match to be considered 'Same'.

seq.title: ⚡ Number Sequence Instructions
steps: A grid of shuffled numbers will appear on the screen
Click the numbers in order 1 → 2 → 3 → … as fast as possible
There are two levels: 3×3 (9 cells) → 4×4 (16 cells)
Wrong clicks won't fail you, but will add a +2s penalty
There is no overall time limit. Please finish as quickly as possible
seq.tip: Don't panic. Scan the entire grid before clicking; finding patterns is faster than clicking randomly!

spa.title: 🔄 Spatial Ability Instructions
steps: The screen will simultaneously show two shapes
One of the shapes is rotated. Judge whether they are the same shape
First 5 Qs: Both shape and color must match; Last 5 Qs: Only judge the shape
Time limit is 5s per question, 10 questions in total
spa.tip: Mentally 'rotate' the shape back, ignoring the difference in rotation angle.

test.mem_watch: Please watch closely and remember the sequence of shapes
test.mem_answer: Please click the shapes in the order you saw them
test.rea_instruction: Both shape and color must match to be considered 'Same'
test.spa_strict_question: Are both shape and color the same? (ignore rotation)
test.spa_strict_instruction: Are the shape and color of the two objects exactly the same? (Rotation doesn't count as a difference)
test.spa_loose_instruction: Are the shapes the same? (Ignore color differences)

spa_break.title: Spatial Test — Second Half
spa_break.subtitle:
The first 5 questions are done. The difficulty will now increase.
Please confirm the rules below before continuing.
rules: The screen will simultaneously show two shapes
Last 5 Qs: Only judge if the shapes are the same (ignore color)
Mentally 'rotate' the shape back, ignoring the rotation angle
Time limit is 5s per question. Please answer quickly
Wrong answers won't be notified immediately, but will affect your final score
spa_break.tip: For the last 5 Qs: Only look at the shape; ignore the color
spa_break.btn_continue: ✅ I understand the rules, continue to the last 5 questions

results.title: 🎉 Test Results
results.btn_learn_more: 💡 Learn more ways to improve cognition
results.att_calc_note: Calculated from the average speed of Memory, Reaction, and Spatial
results.radar_subtitle: Dashed Line = Age {age} Norm (70%) | Red = Your Performance | Exceeding the dashed line means you performed better than your peers
results.recommend_basis: Personalized advice based on your lowest scoring ability
results.recommend_closing_1: The brain is plastic! With regular practice, all cognitive abilities can continuously improve.
results.recommend_closing_2: We recommend continuously taking in good 'new stimuli'. Test again after 4 weeks to observe your growth.
results.recommend_closing_3: 💪 Keep it up! Your progress starts today.
results.percentile_hint_1: 📊 The higher the percentile, the more peers you outperformed.
results.percentile_hint_2: 🎯 Ex: 80th Percentile = Better than 80% of peers in your age group.
results.percentile_att_note: Focus is comprehensively calculated from Memory, Reaction, and Spatial abilities
results.history_empty_desc: Your records will appear here after you complete a test
results.positive_feedback_fallback: Congratulations on completing the assessment! Please maintain this vitality and health.
results.recommend_closing: The brain is plastic! With regular practice, all cognitive abilities can continuously improve. We recommend getting good 'new stimuli' and testing again in 4 weeks to observe your growth. 💪 Keep it up! Your progress starts today.
